name: claudectl
description: One local `claudectl` MCP: Claude Max account pool + live 5h/7d limits + pin/switch via the llm.hostbun.cc router /api/* control plane (accounts_list, live_limits, account_add/delete/switch, proxy_pin/proxy_route, routing/stats/call-log) AND terminal steer/restart across boxes + plugin/marketplace/mcp mgmt. Plus skills and the cccc TUI. (The cmux Dock split into the devdashco/claudectl repo as its own `cmuxdock` plugin.)
